## SAF1.4. Rate of separation minima infringements (SMIs) (PI#2)

At State level, Romania reported 17 separation minima infringements (SMI) in their airspace during 2025. The rate of separation minima infringements was below Union-wide average (2.87 vs 7.10).

At ANSP level, ROMATSA reported 19 SMIs with ATS/CNS contribution. The rate of separation minima infringements at ANSP level was lower than the Union-wide average (1.92 vs 6.0).

When comparing to 2024, the rate of separation minima infringements has increased at both State level (2.87 vs 1.03) and at ANSP level (1.92 vs 1.04).
